name: Pipendoxifene
description: ER modulator, ERA-923(Pipendoxifene) is a estrogen receptor modulator being evaluated for the treatment of breast cancer. Pipendoxifene is a new 2-phenyl indole selective estrogen receptor modulators (SERM )that exhibits an excellent preclinical pharmacological profile and was selected for further development as a treatment for metastatic breast cancer.
indication: Investigated for use/treatment in breast cancer.
mechanismOfAction: ERA-923 inhibits estrogen-stimulated growth associated with cytostasis. It has been shown to have a potent, selective oestrogen modulating effect, with few uterine side-effects.
